author: shimashimarin
body:
Sherpa version 3 have been released last year [Sherpa release](https://gitlab.com/sherpa-team/sherpa/-/releases). This is a big jump of Sherpa version from `v2.2.16` to `v3.0.4`:
- Switch to cmake
- Add libzip for Sherpa3
- Add openloops inlcude folder for compiling Sherpa3
title: Update Sherpa to v3
